metadata.title: PaoPaoAnime - Anime Streaming Schedule
metadata.description: Find out where and when this season's anime is streaming. Covers DMM TV, U-NEXT, d Anime Store, ABEMA, and more.
metadata.ogDescription: This season's anime — when and where to watch. Easily check across DMM TV, U-NEXT, d Anime Store, ABEMA, Netflix, and Disney+.
metadata.twitterDescription: This season's anime — when and where to watch.

home.tagline: This season's anime — when and where to stream. Check easily with PaoPao.

auth.loginBenefits: Log in to manage your anime more easily.
auth.signupLoginFailed: Account created, but automatic login failed.
auth.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth.loginFeatures: What you can do after logging in
auth.feature1Title: Hide anime you're not interested in
auth.feature1Desc: Hide unwanted anime from your home screen and keep your own list.
auth.feature2Desc: Filter out hidden anime and only see what you want to watch.
auth.feature3Desc: Favorites, notifications, and more features coming soon.

forgot.emailSent: If an account exists, we've sent a password reset link to your email.

reset.title: Set a new password

drops.title: Dropped list
drops.description: Anime hidden from your home screen. Use "Remove" to delete permanently or "Undo" to restore.
drops.emptyHint: Tap the ✕ button on anime cards on the home screen to add them here

settings.title: Settings
settings.platformsDescription: Select and order your streaming platforms. Anime from preferred platforms will appear first on the home screen.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.warning: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data (dropped list, platform settings, etc.). This action cannot be undone.

errors.emailRequired: Please enter your email and password.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

about.title: About PaoPaoAnime
about.intro: PaoPaoAnime is a service that lets you check anime streaming schedules across all major platforms in Japan.
about.whyText1: When watching anime in Japan, there are too many streaming platforms — DMM TV, U-NEXT, d Anime Store, ABEMA, Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, Disney+… It's hard to figure out which anime streams where and when.
about.whyText2: Checking each platform's website individually is inefficient. PaoPaoAnime gathers streaming info from all platforms in one place, making it easy to check by day, time, and platform.
about.feature1: Latest episode list for this season's anime
about.platformsList: DMM TV / U-NEXT / d Anime Store / ABEMA / Amazon Prime Video / Netflix / Disney+
about.dataText: Streaming schedule data is based on official information from each platform and updated every season. While we strive for accuracy, please verify actual schedules on the official platform websites.
about.contactText: For feedback, suggestions, or data corrections, please contact us at {email}.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: PaoPaoAnime ("the Service") does not currently offer user registration and does not collect personal information.
privacy.section2Text: The Service may use browser local storage for convenience, such as saving platform filter settings. This data is not sent to our servers.
privacy.section3Text: The Service may use analytics tools to improve the service. These tools collect access information anonymously and do not include personally identifiable information.
privacy.section4Text: The Service may contain links to external websites (streaming platforms, etc.). Privacy policies of linked sites are governed by their respective policies.
privacy.section5Text: This policy may be updated without notice. Changes take effect when posted on this page.
privacy.section6Text: For privacy-related questions, please contact us via GitHub Issues or email.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.article1Text: PaoPaoAnime ("the Service") is a website that provides anime streaming schedule information in Japan. The Service is free to use.
terms.article2Text: Streaming schedule information provided by the Service is based on official platform data but is not guaranteed to be accurate, complete, or up-to-date. Please verify actual schedules on official platform websites.
terms.article3Text: Copyright for anime images, titles, and related content belongs to their respective copyright holders. The Service aggregates and organizes information without intent to infringe on any copyrights.
terms.article4Text: The Service contains links to external websites. We bear no responsibility for the content of linked sites.
terms.article5Text: These terms may be updated without notice. Changes take effect when posted on this page.
